layout.empty_hint: No cards or boxes have been added yet
editor.auto_grid_hint: The grid responds to container width automatically. Mobile is always two columns and no manual column control is exposed.
editor.sort_manual_hint: Adjust manual order in the editing engine content list tab by dragging entries.
editor.sort_runtime_hint: When name sorting is enabled, the layout reorders items by title at render time.
editor.background_desc: Upload an image or provide webpage HTML to render the whole box background.
editor.top_region_desc: The top area is a responsive iframe region for titles, hero art, or custom webpage content.
editor.html_placeholder: Enter HTML that will be shown inside the controlled iframe.
